sn18.9:1.1: … "What do you think, Rahula, is the earth element … the water element … the heat element … the air element … the space element … the consciousness element permanent or impermanent?"–"Impermanent, venerable sir." …
sn18.9:1.2: "Seeing thus, Rahula, the instructed noble disciple experiences revulsion towards the earth element …sn.ii.249… revulsion towards the water element … revulsion towards the heat element
sn18.9:1.3: … revulsion towards the air element … revulsion towards the space element … revulsion towards the consciousness element. Experiencing revulsion, he becomes dispassionate … . He understands: ‘… there is no more for this state of being.’"
